gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating the health metrics and stats for all the apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot and Polly the bee acting as gardeners/inspectors in a greenhouse, checking the health of various code-plants (representing the apps).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
